config.coordsonscreen.title: CoordsOnScreen Settings
config.coordsonscreen.position.tooltip: The corner of the screen where coordinates are displayed.
config.coordsonscreen.x_padding.tooltip: Horizontal offset from the screen edge in pixels.
config.coordsonscreen.y_padding.tooltip: Vertical offset from the screen edge in pixels.
config.coordsonscreen.font_size.tooltip: On-screen size of the coordinates, independent of the GUI Scale setting. 100% matches GUI Scale 2 and stays the same size no matter your GUI Scale.
config.coordsonscreen.show_main_coords.t: Toggles the current dimension's coordinate display.
config.coordsonscreen.show_alt_coords.to: Toggles the secondary bracketed equivalent coordinates.
